SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-08-2016 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. " PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS, CENTURY NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY AND LUCIA TRUCKING ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS NOT PROPER PARTIES. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD ANOTHER PERSON AS A DEFENDANT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUCIA TRUCKING WAS REPRESENTED BY NELSON FRANCIA--OWNER. DEFENDANT CENTURY NATIONAL ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK BUCHHOLTZ--PROPERTY FIELD ADJUSTER CNI. DEFENDANT LUCIA TRUCKING WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---CARLOS VALDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THIS CAUSE COMES ON THIS DATE AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED FOR A SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL AS A TRIAL DE NOVO, WITH THE COURT, THE APPELLANT AND THE RESPONDENT PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM; BOTH PARTIES FOR BOTH SIDES SIGN THE STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM, WHICH IS FILED; THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO ALL PARTIES; THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE THAT IS INTRODUCED, MARKED AND IDENTIFIED. THEREUPON, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.
PRO TEM JUDGE: DIANA KRUZE; CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).
